label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won solo from breakaway, stamped away when CRON attacked with ~60km to go, extending margin on final climb.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL responded to CRON's attack not defensively but by accelerating harder, treating challenge as disrespectful provocation worth dominating.
KUSS super-domestiques VINGEGAARD/ROGLIC both served him final meters, team hierarchy message delivered publicly after prior day's controversy.
AYUSO vs LANDO Spanish classification battle allowed minor GC splits; AYUSO gained seconds with ROGLIC/MAS at finish over LANDO.
VLASOV attached to DENZ wheel specifically hunting top-10 position on descents, not waiting for final climb.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: metronomic mountain point collection from breakaway suggests total domination in selective mountain stages when given freedom
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: publicly supported by VINGEGAARD/ROGLIC in closing meters after team tension questions, 17-second lead appears secure
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: gained seconds over LANDO for Spanish classification with MAS/ROGLIC but required support, not independent strength
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: struggling while supposedly supporting AYUSO, domestique role breakdown evident
rider_signals.CRON Antonie: negative: attacking EVENEPOEL with 60km remaining backfired badly, treated as disrespectful and punished decisively
